title: Just Work
author: Kim Scott
subline: How to bias interrupt, build inclusion, and bring out the best in everyone.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <g transform="translate(420 1180)" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1.5">
    <g>
      <g transform="translate(0 0)"><circle cx="80" cy="40" r="30"/><path d="M 20 200 Q 80 100 140 200 Z"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(190 0)"><circle cx="80" cy="40" r="30"/><path d="M 20 200 Q 80 100 140 200 Z"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(380 0)" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2.5"><circle cx="80" cy="40" r="30"/><path d="M 20 200 Q 80 100 140 200 Z"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(570 0)"><circle cx="80" cy="40" r="30"/><path d="M 20 200 Q 80 100 140 200 Z"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(760 0)"><circle cx="80" cy="40" r="30"/><path d="M 20 200 Q 80 100 140 200 Z"/></g>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(0 260)">
      <g transform="translate(0 0)"><circle cx="80" cy="40" r="30"/><path d="M 20 200 Q 80 100 140 200 Z"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(190 0)"><circle cx="80" cy="40" r="30"/><path d="M 20 200 Q 80 100 140 200 Z"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(380 0)"><circle cx="80" cy="40" r="30"/><path d="M 20 200 Q 80 100 140 200 Z"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(570 0)"><circle cx="80" cy="40" r="30"/><path d="M 20 200 Q 80 100 140 200 Z"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(760 0)"><circle cx="80" cy="40" r="30"/><path d="M 20 200 Q 80 100 140 200 Z"/></g>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(0 520)">
      <g transform="translate(0 0)"><circle cx="80" cy="40" r="30"/><path d="M 20 200 Q 80 100 140 200 Z"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(190 0)"><circle cx="80" cy="40" r="30"/><path d="M 20 200 Q 80 100 140 200 Z"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(380 0)"><circle cx="80" cy="40" r="30"/><path d="M 20 200 Q 80 100 140 200 Z"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(570 0)"><circle cx="80" cy="40" r="30"/><path d="M 20 200 Q 80 100 140 200 Z"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(760 0)"><circle cx="80" cy="40" r="30"/><path d="M 20 200 Q 80 100 140 200 Z"/></g>
    </g>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="2150" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">A WORKPLACE WHERE EVERYONE CAN DO THEIR BEST WORK</text>
</svg>
rationale: Fifteen equal person silhouettes arranged in a 5x3 grid; one (center top) is rendered in red 2.5px stroke, all others in graphite 1.5px. The red figure is the book's target — the one who benefits when 'Just Work' is done. Title 420px uppercase stacks at top, the grid sits in the lower half, caption whisper at the bottom. Reads as a 'before' / 'highlighted one' diagram from a workplace training deck.
